column3: I hypothesize that the claude-mem@thedotmack plugin's Stop hook is the source of "Stop hook error: JSON validation failed" because it outputs non-JSON text (summaries/CLAUDE.md context) to stdout via bun-runner.js's stdio:inherit, and the plugin is NOT explicitly disabled in enabledPlugins (bun-runner.js only checks ===false).
column6: History shows persistent "Ran 1 stop hook → Stop hook error: JSON validation failed" across 20+ sessions. claude-mem hooks.json registers a Stop hook that calls worker-service.cjs summarize with stdout=inherit. bun-runner.js isPluginDisabledInClaudeSettings() returns false when enabledPlugins['claude-mem@thedotmack'] is absent (not ===false). Worker service is running on port 37777 proving plugin is active.
